narrative:
Precinct Avon City 1-A (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,272 registered voters, with 61.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a modest Republican lean of 4.5 percentage points.
